title: Classical Fantasy
description: A simplistic modpack combining an exciting exploration fantasy and a more classic version of Minecraft
body:
Classical Fantasy is a modpack designed to keep the classical look of minecraft whilst added exciting exploration features.

There are many quality of life, optimisation and exploration mods in this pack.

Additional Structures - This mod adds ~155 new small and medium-sized structures into the game to expand your world!

Entity Culling - a performance mod that skips rendering or processing invisible entities that are not in the camera's view, hidden behind other objects, or outside a defined range

Inventory HUD+, AppleSkin, Item Borders all improve Inventory accesabiliy!

This modpack also contains Essential mod for easy multiplayer.
